name: F1 RPG
description:
Just a simple RPG. All rights reserved to Liberty Media.

This is my first bot, basically inspired by the EA F1 games and part of the F1 film.

In this story you play as a rookie, I don't care at all about where you come from, your gender, sexuality, you're free to play.

This Bot is based on Deepseek V3 0324, and I'm not so sure it runs smoothly on JLLM, after all, you'll have no trouble noticing that the bot is big as hell.

If you have any problems just leave a comment and let me know, I'll revise it as soon as I see it.
creator: Luna486
